CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Continued To Jul-22-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-07-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
William Warden, Esq. for Plaintiff: United Rentals Northwest, Inc., an Oregon Corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Mike Sanders, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Valta Communication, a Louisiana corporation; and San Jose Community College, a municipal organization of unknown form as follows:
Total Damages $33,720.03
Total Interest $2,790.71
Total Attorney's Fees $4,300.00
Total Costs $504.52, for a grand total of $41,315.26 (see scanned doc. for breakdown of Judgment)
Judgment signed in open court.
